metaDescription: Learn about HR — the Bulgarian HR platform built for SMBs. Meet our team, mission, and values.

hero.heading: About HR
hero.subheading: We are building the HR platform that Bulgarian companies actually need — simple, compliant, and powerful.

story.heading: Our Story
story.content1: HR was founded in Sofia by a team of HR professionals and engineers who saw firsthand how Bulgarian SMBs struggled with outdated HR processes, manual spreadsheets, and expensive enterprise software that did not fit their needs.
story.content2: We built a platform combining powerful automation with a simple, intuitive interface — so HR teams can focus on people, not paperwork. Today, hundreds of Bulgarian companies trust HR to manage their entire employee lifecycle.

mission.heading: Our Mission & Values
mission.content: To make great HR accessible to every Bulgarian company, regardless of size or budget. We believe every employee deserves a professional onboarding, every candidate deserves a respectful process, and every HR team deserves tools that actually work.

simplicity.title: Simplicity
simplicity.description: HR software should not require a PhD to use. Every feature prioritizes ease of use and fast time-to-value.

innovation.title: Innovation
innovation.description: We embrace AI and automation to save HR teams hours of manual work every week.

compliance.title: Compliance
compliance.description: Full compliance with Bulgarian labor law and GDPR. SOC 2 Type II certified. Your data is safe.

team.heading: Leadership Team
team.subheading: Meet the people building the future of HR in Bulgaria.

members.ceoBio: Former HR Director with 10+ years in talent acquisition across Bulgarian and European markets.
members.ctoBio: Software architect with experience building enterprise SaaS platforms at scale.
members.cpoBio: Product designer focused on making complex HR workflows feel effortless.
members.cooBio: Operations expert who has scaled HR departments across Central and Eastern Europe.

cta.heading: Ready to transform your HR?
cta.subheading: Join hundreds of Bulgarian companies already hiring smarter with HR.
